title: Dvorak
description: An Airship-Based Modpack with ever-scaling difficulty. Keep Moving or risk becoming overwhelmed.
body:
Dvorak is centered around the constant need to move outward. This is made easy by the inclusion of airships and a variety of both magical and technological mods. These airborne structures will need to be your base of operation if you hope to last more than a few weeks. "Why do I need to keep moving?" you might ask, Every night the monsters of the world grow stronger. The only way to prevent them from getting too powerful for you is to keep moving away from the center of the world.

Every ten nights, a bloodmoon rises, boasting stronger and more numerous monsters. These creatures are much more persistent than your average zombie. I'm not sure if a few blocks and a door will be enough to keep them at bay.
